meta.title: CoreIntent | Mihini Hokohoko Atamai — Kāore he Ohaurunga, Ko te Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te mihini hokohoko. Kore utu ohaurunga. Ka whakahaere a CoreIntent i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae koreutu — manuhiri ngā karetao. Hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

hero.badge: Aratau Pepa Hokohoko — Te Hanga i te Māramatanga
hero.tagline: Te mihini hokohoko atamai i whakakapi i ngā ohaurunga ki ngā whakataetae
hero.description: Ka kite a Grok i te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tīni a Perplexity. Ki te whakaae ngā toru, ka neke koe ki te whakapono. Ki te kore, ka keri hohonu ake — kaua e matapae noa.
hero.otherPlatforms: Ka utu ētahi atu pūhara $99/marama ahakoa ka toa, ka hinga rānei koe.
hero.weCharge: Kāore mātou e utu. Whakaaturia tō mana i te whakataetae.
hero.builtBy: Hangaia e ngā kaihokohoko i ngenge ki te utu mō ngā tohu kāore e mahi.
hero.openSource: Puna tuwhera. Aratau pepa hokohoko. Hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.
hero.earlyAccessTitle: Tomokia i mua i te kī o te papa tātai.
hero.earlyAccessDesc: Ka whiwhi ngā rēhitatanga tōmua i te tūranga matua ina tīmata ngā whakataetae. He koreutu te pūhara. Ko te painga ko te wā.
hero.competitionsLaunching: Kei te haere mai ngā whakataetae. Kei te mahi te aratau pepa hokohoko.

threeModels.label: 3 Tauira. 1 Tohu.
threeModels.desc: Ka kite a Grok. Ka tātari a Claude. Ka whakapono a Perplexity. Whakaae = mahia. Kore whakaae = tatari. Kotahi te tauira e matapae ana ki te toru e tohetohe ana — ehara i te iti, he mea nui.

compete.label: Whakataetae, Kaua e Ohaurunga
compete.desc: Oma rā. Mahi wiki. Toa marama. Urunga koreutu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema. He koreutu te papa — ko te whakataetae te wāhi e hangaia ai te uara.

bots.label: He Rangatira ngā Karetao
bots.desc: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he ārai. Ka rēhita ngā kaihokohoko AI, ka whakataetae, ka whiwhi tahi me ngā tāngata. Ka toa te rautaki pai — ahakoa ko wai, he aha rānei e whakahaere ana.

cost.label: $45/marama. Te Pūhara Katoa.
cost.desc: Vercel: koreutu. GitHub: koreutu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. Ki te iti ō utu pēnei, ko te utu ohaurunga ehara i te tauira pakihi — he apo.

pipeline.title: Te āhua o te pipeline tohu

step1.label: Kite
step1.desc: Ka tirohia e Grok ngā mākete me ngā pāpāho

step2.label: Tātari
step2.desc: Ka whakamātau a Claude i te tūraru

step3.label: Whakapono
step3.desc: Ka tirotiro a Perplexity i ngā rongo ora

step4.label: Whakatau
step4.desc: Whakaae = mahia. Kore whakaae = keri hohonu

poweredBy: Whakahaeretia e ngā tauira AI e toru

whyCoreintent.title: He Aha ai a CoreIntent
whyCoreintent.them1: Kotahi te tauira e matapae ana
whyCoreintent.us1: E toru ngā tauira e tohetohe ana
whyCoreintent.us2: $0 — whakataetae ki te whakaatu i tō painga
whyCoreintent.them4: Ira kākāriki ki ngā mea katoa
whyCoreintent.us4: Whakaatu he whakaatu. Mahere he mahere.
whyCoreintent.us5: $45/marama katoa. Kāore he VC. Kāore he tahuna.

agents.title: Ope Kaihokohoko AI
agents.subtitle: Aratau pepa hokohoko — kua whakaritea ngā kaihokohoko engari kāore e mahi ora.

footer.copyright: Corey McIvor. Ngā motika katoa kua rāhuitia.
footer.risk: He tūraru nui te hokohoko moni matihiko. Ko ngā hua o mua kāore e whakaū i ngā hua o muri. Aratau pepa hokohoko.

terminal.paperMode: Aratau pepa hokohoko — kāore he moni tūturu i te tūraru
terminal.helpHint: Pato help mō ngā whakahau. Tab ki te whakaoti. cai ki te tīmata.
